title: デビュー戦の後に・ディスカッション

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The night after the race, Biwa Hayahide asks that
we review her performance, so we start looking
through it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she sits there analyzing the footage, it's clear
that she's preoccupied with thoughts of her sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Creating an equation to beat Narita Brian will be
a herculean task. The best thing I can do to help
is give her practical experience by pitting her
against strong opponents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this in mind, we set our sights on the Asahi
Hai F.S., a junior G1 race.
